payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the latest applicable memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded, so it should not be presented as the current fact.
payload.decision: Return mem_new for Sam from Goldman because it is the most recent applicable memory; filter mem_old because it has been superseded and should not be treated as current.

entity_resolution.reason: Sam from Goldman appears to refer to the same person context used by the recall result, but no stable entity ID is provided in the prompt.

memory_cards.statement: Recall selected mem_new for Sam from Goldman as the current memory.
mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded and not current.

details: Explained why mem_old was excluded as superseded.
Preserved ambiguity by not assigning a stable entity ID.

repair_options: If needed, attach a stable entity ID for Sam to reduce ambiguity.
If mem_old should remain accessible historically, mark it explicitly as archived rather than current.

raw_text: {"intent":"explain_recall","decision":"Return mem_new for Sam from Goldman because it is the most recent applicable memory; filter mem_old because it has been superseded and should not be treated as current.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"fact","statement":"Recall selected mem_new for Sam from Goldman as the current memory.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"affiliation"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"associated_with","object":"Goldman"},{"subject":"mem_new","predicate":"supersedes","object":"mem_old"}]},{"kind":"fact","statement":"mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded and not current.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"mem_old","type":"memory","role":"deprecated_memory"},{"name":"mem_new","type":"memory","role":"current_memory"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"mem_old","predicate":"is_superseded_by","object":"mem_new"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"resolve_to_existing","entity_id":null,"reason":"Sam from Goldman appears to refer to the same person context used by the recall result, but no stable entity ID is provided in the prompt."},"conflict_classification":"supersession","answer":"Recall returned mem_new because it is the latest applicable memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded, so it should not be presented as the current fact.","citations":["fixture: debug_explain_recall_sam__context"],"repair_options":["If needed, attach a stable entity ID for Sam to reduce ambiguity.","If mem_old should remain accessible historically, mark it explicitly as archived rather than current."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Explained why mem_new was selected.","Explained why mem_old was excluded as superseded.","Preserved ambiguity by not assigning a stable entity ID."]}}
